subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! Thy letter was received, and its contents were filled with spiritual attractions [3.5s]... ...Jináb-i-Karbilá’í Muhammad-Hádí, the custodian of the Mashriqu’l-Adhkár, is my master. In other words, I am his servant
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب نفحات الله نامه مرقوم ملاحظه گردید مضمون مشحون بانجذابات روحانیه
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love and unity, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
